nasb.text: The chief priests took the pieces of silver and said, “It is not lawful to put them into the temple treasury, since it is the price of blood.”

esv.text: But the chief priests, taking the pieces of silver, said, “It is not lawful to put them into the treasury, since it is blood money.”

cnv.text: 祭司長把銀子拾起來，說：“這是血錢，不可放在殿庫裡。”

ccb.text: 祭司长们捡起银子，说：“这是血钱，不可收进圣殿的库房。”

csbs.text: 祭司长们捡起银钱，说：“这既然是血钱，不可以放到圣殿奉献里。”
